name: deciduous_vs_rest_exp01
description: Binary deciduous (1) vs evergreen/semi-evergreen (0) — exp01 species review. Karanj, Sausage tree, Caribbean trumpet and Frangipani excluded (-1) pending ESD placement confirmation.
notes: Karanj + Caribbean trumpet confirmed deciduous. Sausage tree + Frangipani confirmed evergreen (not_deciduous). Caribbean trumpet remains excluded from ESD (ambiguous evergreen/semi-evergreen).
